headline: Bernstein Cuts PT on Expedia Group (EXPE) to $253 From $256 – Here’s Why
summary: Expedia Group, Inc. (NASDAQ:EXPE) is one of the most undervalued hotel stocks to invest in now. On March 11, Bernstein cut the price target on Expedia Group, Inc. (NASDAQ:EXPE) to $253 from $256 while reiterating a Market Perform rating on the shares. The firm stated that all three OTAs delivered a top and bottom-line beat, […]

headline: QVAL: Value ETF Lagging Its Peers
summary: QVAL demonstrates a rare blend of value and growth, with a focus on mid-caps, consumer discretionary, and industrials. Read my analysis of the QVAL ETF here.

headline: Analysts Mixed on Expedia Group (EXPE) Despite Strong Finish to 2025
summary: Expedia Group, Inc. (NASDAQ:EXPE) earns a place on our 13 stocks with consistent growth to buy right now. A majority of the covering analysts remain mixed on Expedia Group, Inc. (NASDAQ:EXPE). The consensus price target of $268.00 reflects an upside potential of just under 20%. The company’s strong finish to 2025 renewed analysts’ confidence, as […]
